reviews.review_description: This is a very fun game but it could use a little more content. Honestly super fun and I'm a huge history nerd and it fits very well with her history and violence it has. Very fun game for after work as well

This game is so fun This game is so fun. I got somebody kill me. Guys, it is day seven of our 90-day run, and this is how much we made. We got around two hundred dollars right here, and we're just over the top. And I just got this game like ten minutes

I play games like blade and sorcery but I understand cutting corners some times but the fact you have to do stupid PVP before the story it takes the fun out of it the enemies are to easy to kill and the graphics suck and to be honest after the head falling off after me tapping them with the weapon to be honest it sucks all the fun out not worth the money if I could give 0 stars I would

Love this game so far. It does get harder but I'm a mid 50 year old learning VR. Only glitch is sometimes my head rotation on the stick stops working and I have to move my whole body. I've walked into the backyard planters a couple times. 🤣 Still a great game in my opinion. Worth the 5 bucks.

I've played this game's arena mode for a while and I want to mention the violence. The game contains a fair amount such as: blood spewing when you stab of decapitate, a red patch of blood stays on the npc when you slash or stab, there are some blood effects like droplets flying everywhere. The gore isn't the absolute best but I still recommend the game.
Its mid but its ok for 10 dollars

The game is very well thought and there's many weapons and things, but you could still add more. Sorry but the game looks kinda still beta so you could make more updates about physics, realism and maybe gore. Simply just add things because after a while it gets boring... oh, and maybe make more game modes

I chose this game because I’m a fencer and interested in Ancient Rome. The positive: I felt like I was actually in the arena. I love the different weapons and such. The game is easy to learn. It’s quite the workout which I wanted! Negative- the tigers move a little glitchy. The game can be glitchy with hands. I wish there were historical trivia inserted - just snippets to make it a history lesson. Otherwise it’s easy to become immersed in the game.

The updates list it, the game settings show it as selectable to activate, yet it doesn't work.

This is FALSE ADVERTISING for those of us who purchase it based on having bHaptics support!!!

Either fix it or remove the statement that the game has it.

reviews.review_title: Really Great Gore!  Absolutely love it!
reviews.review_description:
I would award this game a 4.5 stars but that option wasn’t available.  The reason: when I’m fighting, the menu pops up every so often, which is annoying.  The t stops the action and this game is so exciting you don’t want the action to stop.  I HIGHLY RECOMMEND purchasing this game.  
Worth every penny!  It’s like being in a live mortal kombat arena.  What’s not to love!
Low key kind of boring

Ok let me tell you this. Get ready for a bloody work out. It took me 2 weeks to finish the campaign and that’s just the start of it. There are many more bloody challenges. And you are going to sweat and be sore in the morning but I promise you it will be worth it. And the great addition is that u don’t need internet to play. Just be mindful of your boundaries or you will feel pain

I got this game on sale for $5 and it was a dream. I have tested things out more and Ilove this. This game really is fun. The gladiator style of this game is brought to life perfectly and it was worth every cent!   Yours truly,
                                                      -soundwaverob

The game already has mods :) you can find them in the settings menu -> mods. There are weapon mods and arena mods. 

Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Fun game, but still lots of work to do.
reviews.review_description:
The game is fun, and for that pricetag I can’t really complain much, but it has to be said, that game is still hella buggy with moments where you will go through floor or just randomly slide when crouch.

It also feels empty, with lots of room for improvement, like allowing players to kick in fight or equip other gear then helmet, since NPCs can do that.
I have been playing this game for a while now about 3 months the campaign is amazing and it has a variety of wepons to choose from if you are looking for a gladiator game this is the best one

Very addictive and a good workout. But please don’t play near your TV, I smashed mine within 20 minutes of playing 😪

reviews.review_description: i like this game i do but i HATE the climbing system and compaired to the competition like blade and sorcery i don't feel like this can really hold its own as a full game. Also the dismemberment system is butt.

I have been sore for a week getting my gladiator, Helsok, to the campaign stage. I finally made it and I'm beat. I made it through three stages before I died. The campaign is amazing. The whole game is amazing. I just bought a katana, helmet and short sword in the armory. Tomorrow, it's on. Get this game if you like to feel like you're in the action. Not only is it an adrenaline rush, but it's also a great workout. 5 stars.

So, there a lot of fencing games on vr, I can't say that Gladius is the best, but considering its price, it's definitely a good one. Graphics are not good, there are some bugs, I even refunded this game once, but I gave it second chance and I wasn't disappointed. 
Give it a chance

developer_response.body:
Hi! 

Thank you for reaching out, can you please try to disable this option and see if the problem is fixed:  "Settings>Body>AutoCalibrate On Starting A level"  then click save and restart the game.  
 
If the problem persists, can you please try to reset your Meta Quest guardian and floor level? This fixes the issue for some players.  
 
If that still doesn't work please join our discord server here: https://discord.gg/9um6jqCpeY or send us an email to support@virtualage.com and we will be happy to help you :)

Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
My second review ever. I LOVE - this game and play it daily but I can't give 5 stars due to several flaws that are just not being fixed.

- it's quite monotonous, after having played it daily you notice that's it's always the same enemies
- there are way to few arenas to have fun, I always return to the same one again
- the custom portion is I believe BETA and it will probably be forever as things there just don't work smoothly 
- in the Market there are glitches where you can walk through walls and get stuck 
- in Market it happens quite often that the level won't end although all enemies are defeated 
- in the game beaten enemies often freeze in place, dead, and won't fall down
- sometimes enemies get stuck in Market behind doors and fences, making the game unplayable 
- in Market when you run into one of the stalls on the left and let enemies come to you, there are HEAVY glitches with enemies walking through the walls and just graphical glitches

I wish there were more potions in the arenas, maybe making you taller or smaller or being able to cast spells.

The minotaur in level 8 of the Market arena is GREAT but it's just the only oversized enemy. I wish there were 8 feet gladiators, an oversized tiger, MORE animals then just the tiger and minotaur.

I wish enemies could maybe jump or crouch and not simply just run towards you. More intelligent enemies.

I wish a lot but I hope there will be an update soon as there has not been one in many months.

developer_response.body:
Hi denno! 

Thank you for your review, in the next update we will fix the market issues you mention and 

The last update was just a few weeks ago adding Mixed Reality and blood on weapons among many other things, the new one will come with new enemies to spice things up a bit :)

Cheers

reviews.review_description: Fun game I started playing it after I played b.a.s  but I prefer this more realistic I don’t feel like and in a empty void when playing very fun also I love the Roman Empire so this game hits the spot but I do have to say the story needs help but it’s not bad

It’s not an insane high quality game like Blade and Sorcery. The game is great don’t get me wrong. I just wish it was a little less repetitive. The combat is not as polished as the high quality games like blade and sorcery. It’s hard to chop off limbs because you have to hit them in a specific spot. I was looking forward to the naval battle, because I had just recently watched Gladiator 2, and the naval battle was really good. But in this it was pretty boring. It wasn’t really a naval battle. It was an easy parkour that led to an even easier part later.  It needs a better naval battle. The underworld levels sucked because it was really dark and easy. I killed the Minotaur so easily. I just sliced over and over again.  It needs improvement. But it’s not horrible.
Few glitches but awesome game.    Guys....makes this multiplayer and you have the game of the year.
i think you should do what night club sim does, be able to break bones, smash peoples heads together, ect. also a sheild bash would be great
I'm a pretty big fan of this game, and I hope they expand it.

reviews.review_description: Is a fun game but the game mechanic at first is a bit tedious

Good game but developers could you please remake the threetooth and make the iron paet slimmer just search it up on google if you dont know what i mean and could you also add a throwing net just search it up it was used in gladiator fights

As a new player heres some initial feedback

Coins and food etc should be auto collected. Have to throw down weapon to pick up stuff then pick up weapons again... 

I sharpen a weapon but then am taken to arena and cant sharpen the weapons there ?

Everything is locked at start with no clear understanding on how to work towards unlocking maybe we need some better visual aid to focus on progress

How do we enable passthrough mode ? I have seen vids with it being used but no luck

Can gore be increased ? Like a limb is cut off and they are standing pain and then we can deliver a final blow. Its a good start but want it to feel more violent

Looking forward to watching the game grow

I was a big fan of this game when it came out years ago but unfortunately I think it has fallen behind now, I downloaded the update with a good hope that things have improved in reality very little has changed. 

I don't even appreciate the fact that you have put images and videos of the PC VR version in the game card, it is not a correct move in my opinion, also it makes you disappointed when you then download the standalone version, in fact on the video there are dynamic shadows, and therefore you expect at least dynamic shadows, which are not there. 

I don't want to say that you have not made updates or improvements, but objectively they are hardly noticeable, compared to the last time I downloaded it. 

also what happened to the mixed reality mode? 

I remember that you were talking about improvements for this mode instead it has even disappeared... 

Then I would also have other things to say but it is better to leave it because if it has not improved until now it will hardly improve, I even still see micro freezes at the beginning of the fight. 

I think it was a beautiful game but it had its day despite the update it didn't change much

then honestly as soon as I saw it I deleted it immediately because I felt frustrated maybe there are improvements but I didn't see them immediately

Now to be 100% no sugar coating the game needs a bit of fixing and polishing but it’s a great game I just wish the two handed weapons or the trident was a bit responsive it kept getting stuck on the enemies and then flings it across the stadium.but it’s honestly a fun game  I’m hoping this game thrives for better🫡

reviews.review_title: Gladius: An epic Game Almost perfect
reviews.review_description:
An epic and immersive VR experience set in Ancient Rome

Gladius is an outstanding VR combat game where you step into the shoes of a gladiator fighting for freedom. The experience is highly immersive and varied: you can choose your weapons, train against different types of enemies, and battle in epic fights across some of the most iconic historical settings.

Game Modes

The Games: Survive for 7 days in the glorious Colosseum, facing powerful enemies across spectacular stages like the Egyptian Temple, Naval Battle, Labyrinth, and more.

Arena: Compete on the global leaderboards across 5 different challenges (Infinity, Master of Arms, Bridge Defense, Market, and Chariots) and prove you're the greatest gladiator of all.

Training: Fully customize your game by selecting weapons, enemies, and match duration. You can fight alone or team up with NPC allies.

Community Mods: Explore the creativity of the community with mods ranging from deadly guns and giant spoons to ancient pyramid reconstructions and forge arenas.


My Experience

Gladius is an excellent combat game, also perfect as a fun physical workout.
You can play both standing and seated, making it accessible for everyone.
The combat physics feel realistic, and the immersion is total — you truly feel like a gladiator fighting for survival!
I absolutely love it; every session is exciting, intense, and different.

A tip for the developers

I would love to see weapon weight added to make the experience even more realistic and immersive. It would be the perfect finishing touch to an already amazing game!

Rating:

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ – 5 well-deserved stars!

developer_response.body:
Hi Chiaramarina! 

Thank you very much for your review! You can already change the weapon weight in the settings menu -> combat and set it to your liking :)

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: So fun! I hope they keep doing updates and overall it’s a good game
This is a pretty cool game. I enjoy playing it when I get the chance to play.

When I first looked at the game the pictures really stood out, so I bought it then when I opened the game it did not look anything like the pictures. 


L Rizz game

The potential for this game to be great is there…They just need to allow multi-player with friends to battle each other as well as co-op battle as a team of up to 6 friends. Some bugs and glitches need to be worked out and the bodies need to stay …. More gore detail would be nice, i enjoy chopping off limbs and blood flow realism… This game has great potential, i hope that they continue to improve it and get multiplayer up as soon as possible…

This is a must-play for fans of VR sword-fighting. It's so fluid and easy to play (but also challenging). It seems like a great continuation of what Blade & Sorcery started. It features a campaign mode, training mode, and "arena" with different mini-games that you unlock as you gain "fame" levels. Plus, there's a shop where you can buy different weapons and shields.

My only complaints are very minor. 1) Blood does not show up on your sword. 2) You gain fame points even in training mode, which makes no sense. Other than that, I haven't seen any flaws. If you like Blade & Sorcery, buying this will be the best decision you make.
Updateeeeee theeeeeeeeee gameeeeeeeeee
Its a very awesome game. Please make the blood even MORE realistic

reviews.review_title: Almost fun, if it would work properly.
reviews.review_description:
It could be fun, but the mechanics only work half of the time, it feels incredibly unpolished and is extremely buggy. 
For the time being I cannot recommend buying this game, maybe in another year if the Devs don't jump ship.

This game is very good and accurate to how a gladiator arena would work. One thing to note is that this is not like B&S, it can be difficult at times. Another thing to note is that you slowly earn different modes and get money to unlock weapons. Highly recommend just go into the game with a little more focus than you would for other sword games.

I humbly apologize to the developers, I started the title with very high expectations and in my hasty review I had massacred it. I resumed the title more calmly and playing for several hours I realized that the problem was mine because I had not understood the mechanics of the gameplay. This title has enormous potential and with a few more updates it can easily enter the list of unmissable games. However it has several problems in combat because I noticed that if you keep your arm outstretched with the sword straight towards the opponent you can kill too easily because the opponent will never parry. Personally I would replace the jump with the kick to unbalance the enemy. I would include the possibility of also adding weapons above the shoulders, for example bow and arrows, or other weapons including shields. The cheering from the stands seems taken from a football match, it is not the best and the voice in the background reminds me of mortal combat, it is not suitable for the ancient Rome setting.  I'm sorry to have given three stars but, really, the title has enormous potential and it would take very little to make it glorious, don't give up.

This game is more fun than it has any right to be for the price. It’s more fun than some of the games that cost 2x as much. There’s a story mode if you want, but if you just want to be dropped into an arena and go to town with mods then this is the game for you. I’d love to see more mods and powers added to the game (like maybe force pull or telekenisis, or pyrokenesis)but it’s fantastic as is. Best $8 I’ve spent in the store so far.

I wish I would have read the reviews before I purchased this game. The game opens and brings me to a dark room with some fire and a wall but does nothing after that. It seems other people have had this issue so I tried uninstalling it like the devs. Have suggested and it does the same thing. I've checked the storage on my headset as well and have plenty for the game.

I originally gave this a really bad review. It wouldn't start. The dev responded, and I redownload it. The game is $10 and in early access.  It needs some more time in the oven, which is to be expected.  There are more complete and finished experiences out there. Game has a lot of potential, you just got to give it time.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

I'm sorry you are experiencing this issue, looks like it was not installed correctly for some reason. I just performed a fresh install and it worked fine on my end. 

Can you check if you have enough space in the headset please? The game needs around 3.7GB of free space. Please try to uninstall it and install it again, the first time the game runs might take a little longer to start. Also make sure to allow permissions to read the storage when you first start the game. 

If that doesn't fix the problem, can you please join our discord here: https://discord.gg/y7MmTmcgG6 or send us an email to support@virtualage.com please? We will be happy to help you. 
 
Thanks

reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun. lots of action and different types of enemies to fight against. I got this game on sale for 4.99 and I don’t regret it one bit even at 9.99 it’s worth the buy. Can’t wait till they start doing updates and watch this game get even cooler

reviews.review_title: A blast for some quick fun.
reviews.review_description: It's a game to jump in for 20-30 minutes and use the awesome sword mechanics to decimate the world around you. I can see that sure an update to the enemy ai would be nice, more variability of foes, progressively more armored enemies, etc etc, but as far as a straight hack and slash, you really can't go wrong with this game for the price. Only major issue is there is some problem with the turning mechanics, I use smooth and it "hangs" when you turn I believe it's right, would love to see that smoothed out but gotta give it it's dues, this is a fun game. You like swords? Like straightforward mechanics? This is the game for you, jump in, hack it up.
